name: village hall
identity: The community center of the village where the Midwinter celebration was planned and where the player character received their assignment.
current_status: The player character is currently outside in the snow, recovering from a fall and recalling memories of the village hall, including the worried faces seen there and the assignment received inside.

significance.value: site of Midwinter celebration planning and player assignment

volatile_state.condition: not currently occupied by the player character

notes: Player character is currently away from this location, recalling it.
